/WAVE/apps/el8/eb/software/GCCcore/12.3.0/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libggml.so.0 -o ../../bin/libggml.so.0.9.11 "CMakeFiles/ggml.dir/ggml-backend-dl.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml.dir/ggml-backend-reg.cpp.o"  -Wl,-rpath,/WAVE/users2/unix/rblee/numa_llamacpp/amd_epyc/llama.cpp/build/bin: -ldl ../../bin/libggml-cpu.so.0.9.11 ../../bin/libggml-base.so.0.9.11
